problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
hypothesis: If Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts is applied to universe, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
